## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows conventional style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] No direct changes to unrelated files
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `WORKFLOW.md`, `AGENTS.md` if needed)
- [ ] Reviewer can reproduce with listed commands
